name: Yuhwa Securities co.,ltd.
summary: Yuhwa Securities co.,ltd. provides securities brokerage services in South Korea. The company offers equity capital market and capital raising services; corporate bonds; advisory services related to mergers and acquisitions, division, and transfer of business; private equity funds; real estate PF financial advisory services; and structured financing products. Yuhwa Securities co.,ltd. was founded in 1962 and is based in Seoul, South Korea.
